title: Christmas Joy Jam - where joy for the family meets the spirit of giving!
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - In true festive spirit, local brands, facilitators, and artists have come together to give you a late afternoon filled with pure joy for the entire family!

The Christmas Joy Jam is making its way to Hoekwil in Wilderness at 16:00 on 16 December and it's set to be a must-do for families of the Garden Route.


> It’s a fusion of theatre, music, and movement. Hosted by a blend of brands committed to supporting the community, this event promises to bring families together in a purposeful celebration.


In the words of the two key organisers, Sonja Botha of Living through Learning and Nikki of The Joy Movement, “We are creating a memorable experience, by combining a theatre show and a movement experience, to bring families together on purpose. Together we unite in celebration, and the bonus is that the proceeds support more joy in education.


> Pack your evening picnic and cushions and join the excitement of a highly entertaining double event.


Experience MAfrika, the powerful one-woman show by Nikki Jackman Joy and directed by Hannes Muller.

After a short break and with headphones on, everyone gets to be part of The Global Joy Dance, a worldwide celebration where all enjoy the same playlist for global joy on the same day.


> And in the spirit of giving - all proceeds support three beneficiaries - Hoekwil Primary, Living through Learning, and The UPliftment Programme.


Enjoy the same playlist for global joy on the same day.

Early Bird tickets are now available starting at R90 for children. Special family tickets (for 4) are available for just R450. So, bring Granny and the whole family! Secure your tickets now at Quicket.

Join in to celebrate joy and be in the spirit of giving together!

With special thanks to partners Secret Sunrise Garden Route and The Joy Movement for ensuring this event is next level joy.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
